home.hero_eyebrow: CURATED BY EDITORS · SELECTED BY ARCHITECTS · CREDIT TO THE CREATORS
home.positioning_body: Arco is where leading architects publish their residential work and credential the professionals they collaborate with. We help discerning clients discover exceptional teams through real projects — builders, interior designers, landscape architects, and specialists who have earned their reputation through craft, not advertising.
home.feature_1_body: Leading residential architects submit completed projects for editorial review. Each published project is verified and complete — not a render, not a pitch.
home.feature_2_body: Every professional on a project — builder, interior designer, landscape architect — is credited by the architect they collaborated with. That endorsement means something.
home.feature_3_body: Browse exceptional projects and meet the professionals that realised them in a single click. Save them for later or reach out directly — no middlemen.
home.hero_subtitle: Discover exceptional architecture projects and the professionals behind them.
home.built_for_industry_subtitle: Whether you design, build, or furnish — Arco gives your work the visibility it deserves.
home.for_architects_title: Publish work that sets the standard.
home.for_architects_body: Showcase completed projects, credit the professionals involved, and let your built work speak for itself.
home.for_professionals_body: Get credited on real projects by the architects you work with. Build your reputation through built work, not promotion.

about.hero_subtitle: Exceptional architecture projects and the professionals who realised them.
about.mission_title: Inspiring better architecture through a curated network of architects and professionals worth trusting.
about.proof_1_body: Every project on Arco is completed and standing. Editorially reviewed and documented with verified credits for every contributor. No concepts. No pitches. No self-published portfolios.
about.proof_2_body: Professionals are credited by the architects they collaborated with — through real work, delivered together. That endorsement cannot be bought, gamed, or reviewed into existence. It is earned on site, over time.
about.proof_3_body: Projects are chosen for their architectural merit. Growth is measured by quality, not volume. A smaller collection of extraordinary work is worth more than an endless catalogue of the ordinary.
about.audience_title: Three sides of the same door.
about.for_architects_title: Your work, presented as it deserves to be.
about.for_architects_body: Arco is a curated platform for built residential architecture. It exists to present architectural work as it should be seen — through completed projects, carefully documented, and properly credited. Architects are at the centre of Arco. Always.
about.for_professionals_title: Recognised through the work you deliver.
about.for_professionals_body: Professionals on Arco are credited by the architects they collaborated with — through real work, delivered together. A presence here is earned through collaboration, not promotion. No open listings. No reviews. No self-published portfolios.
about.for_clients_title: A calmer way to discover architecture.
about.for_clients_body: Browse by project type, space, or location. See the work first — then discover the professionals behind it. No lead marketplaces. No auctions. Just the work, and the people trusted to do it well.
about.standard_body: Arco is intentionally selective. Projects are chosen for their architectural merit. Professionals appear through association, not listings. Growth is measured by quality, not volume. Being published on Arco means something.
about.standard_quote: We're not interested in the average. The world already has plenty of ways to find that. Arco is for the work that makes you stop.
about.value_1_body: We move with boldness and purpose. Courage is not the absence of doubt — it is the decision to build anyway.
about.value_2_body: We take full responsibility for what we build. When things go wrong, we learn and move — no deflection, no half-measures.
about.value_3_body: We speak honestly and listen carefully. Titles do not determine whose view counts — the quality of the thinking does.
about.value_4_body: Clarity is a form of craft. Strong judgement, precise execution, and attention to detail are not finishing touches — they are the foundation.
about.value_5_body: We succeed together or not at all. Generous collaboration and shared ownership are what make the work worth doing.
about.value_6_body: We make space for every voice. Curiosity and respect are not policies — they are how we work, every day.
about.careers_body: Arco is being built by a small team with a clear purpose. We are looking for people who care about quality — in architecture and in the work they do every day.
about.careers_role_body: A role for someone who brings structure to ambition — who holds the detail without losing sight of the direction, owns outcomes without ego, and understands that building something lasting requires both vision and discipline.
about.closing_body: Arco is a curated archive of exceptional architecture projects — giving proper credit to the professionals who realised them, and offering a more deliberate alternative to search, social platforms, and directories.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.page_description: Everything you need to know about browsing, publishing, and managing your account on Arco.
faq.browsing_q1: What can I find on Arco?
faq.browsing_a1: Arco is a curated archive of completed residential architecture projects. Every project is verified, documented, and properly credited to the architects and professionals who made it. You will not find concepts, renders, or self-published portfolios here.
faq.browsing_q2: How do I search for specific types of projects?
faq.browsing_a2: Use the filter bar on the Projects page to narrow by project type, architectural style, location, and size. You can also browse by featured collections such as villas, kitchens, outdoor spaces, and new builds.
faq.browsing_q3: Can I save projects and professionals I like?
faq.browsing_a3: Yes. Create a free account and save any project or professional to your collection. Access your saved items at any time from your account dashboard.
faq.browsing_a4: Browsing is always free. There is no paywall to explore projects or discover professionals. An account is only required to save items or get in touch with a professional.
faq.architects_q1: How do I publish a project on Arco?
faq.architects_a1: Projects are published through an architect account. Sign up, create your company profile, and from the dashboard paste the link to a project on your own website — we generate the project automatically by pulling in the title, photos, and details. You can still adjust everything before publishing. Publishing as an architect is free and stays that way — both the profile and the number of projects are unlimited. Our editorial team briefly reviews new submissions before they go live.
faq.architects_q2: What makes a project eligible for Arco?
faq.architects_a2: Projects must be completed residential architecture — built and standing. We look for work with clear architectural intent, quality documentation, and verified credits. Speculative designs, renders, and unbuilt concepts are not accepted.
faq.architects_q3: How do I credit the professionals who worked on my project?
faq.architects_a3: Professionals such as builders, carpenters, garden designers, interior designers, and suppliers are not employees of your studio — they are independent parties you collaborated with on a project. During the project upload, you can invite them by email through Arco. Once they accept the invitation, they are named on the project and it appears on their profile page automatically. For them it's free up to 3 projects — linking more projects requires a Pro subscription.
faq.architects_q4: Can I control who sees my projects?
faq.architects_a4: Projects remain private as drafts until you choose to publish them. Published projects are visible to everyone. You can unpublish a project at any time from your dashboard.
faq.architects_q5: What does it cost to publish on Arco as an architect?
faq.architects_a5: Nothing. Publishing as an architect is and always will be free — unlimited projects, unlimited visibility. Architects are the backbone of Arco: every project you publish brings visibility to the professionals you work with.
faq.professionals_q1: How do I appear on Arco as a professional?
faq.professionals_a1: Professionals appear on Arco by being named on a published project by the architect they collaborated with. There are no self-published listings — your presence is earned through verified collaboration. Your company profile is always free, and your first 3 projects cost nothing; for more projects on your profile you use a Pro subscription.
faq.professionals_q2: Can I create my own profile without being credited?
faq.professionals_a2: You can create a company account and complete your profile, but your work will only appear publicly once an architect credits you on a project. This is by design — quality is earned, not claimed.
faq.professionals_q3: What does it mean to be credited on a project?
faq.professionals_a3: It means the architect you collaborated with has acknowledged your contribution to a real, completed project. That credit is public, permanent, and directly associated with the finished work.
faq.professionals_q4: How do I join my company's account on Arco?
faq.professionals_a4: Ask your company administrator to invite you by email from the company dashboard. You will receive an invitation link to join the team.
faq.professionals_q5: What does it cost to appear on Arco?
faq.professionals_a5: Your company profile and the first 3 projects you're credited on are free. If you want to show more projects on your profile page, add team members, or view analytics, you can upgrade to Pro for €39/month (billed annually) or €49/month.
faq.professionals_q6: I've been credited on a project — do I need to do anything?
faq.professionals_a6: You'll receive an email as soon as an architect credits you on a project. Accept the invitation and the project will appear on your profile immediately. No further steps needed.
faq.account_q1: How do I create an account?
faq.account_a1: Click Log in at the top of any page and sign up with your email address. During registration you will be asked to select your account type — client, architect, or professional.
faq.account_a2: Publishing projects and a company profile are always free. Architects can publish unlimited projects at no cost. Professionals who want to show more than 3 projects on their profile page, or add team members and analytics, can upgrade to Pro (€39/month billed annually, €49 monthly). See the Pricing page for details.
faq.account_q3: How do I update my company profile?
faq.account_a3: From your dashboard, navigate to Company settings. You can update your company name, description, services, and profile photo at any time.
faq.account_q4: How do I get in touch if something isn't working?
faq.account_a4: Send an email to hello@arcolist.com and we will get back to you as quickly as possible. For billing questions, include your account email so we can locate your account.
faq.contact_description: If you didn't find what you were looking for, send us a message and we'll get back to you.

dashboard.pricing_subtitle: Publishing projects is always free. Upgrade to grow your visibility as a credited professional.
dashboard.pricing_free_desc: Publish projects and get started as a professional
dashboard.pricing_pro_desc: Showcase your best work and grow your visibility
dashboard.pricing_feature_published_tooltip: Projects you publish as the lead designer. Every project is reviewed by our team before going live.
dashboard.pricing_feature_contributor_tooltip: Projects where another company credits you as a contributor — builder, interior designer, kitchen specialist, or other professional. Every credit grows your visibility on Arco.
dashboard.pricing_feature_company_page_tooltip: Your public profile on Arco — every project you've published or been credited on, alongside services, team, and contact details.
dashboard.pricing_feature_team_tooltip: Invite team members to collaborate on your company profile. Each member gets their own login and can publish on behalf of the company.
dashboard.pricing_feature_analytics_tooltip: See how often your profile and projects are viewed, where visitors come from, and which work generates the most interest from clients.
dashboard.pricing_feature_arco_approved_tooltip: We've verified the company in the KvK register, matched the listed owner to the registered director, and received proof of professional insurance.
dashboard.pricing_publishing_free_body: Architects are the backbone of Arco. Every project you publish brings visibility to the professionals you work with — and builds a platform the industry can be proud of. That's why publishing will always be free.
dashboard.pricing_faq_q1: What's the difference between publishing and being credited?
dashboard.pricing_faq_a1: Publishing means you upload and own the project on Arco. Being credited means another professional (usually the architect) added you to their project. Publishing is always free.
dashboard.pricing_faq_q2: I'm an architect — do I need Pro?
dashboard.pricing_faq_a2: Not for publishing. You can publish unlimited projects for free. Pro gives you team management, portfolio analytics, and a full company page.
dashboard.pricing_faq_a3: Pro is €49/month billed monthly, or €39/month when billed annually (€468/year). We're integrating Stripe — until then, all features are available to help you get started.

architects.hero_title: Publish your work. Credit your team. Set the standard.
architects.hero_body: Arco is a curated architecture platform where projects come first and recognition is earned through built work — not promotion.
architects.cta_placeholder: Paste a project link from your website
architects.benefit_1_body: Join a selective network of exceptional architects. Every project is reviewed to maintain the platform's high standards.
architects.benefit_2_body: Showcase your portfolio, connect with clients, and manage inquiries — all completely free.
architects.benefit_2_feature_2: Your reputation grows through who you work with
architects.benefit_2_feature_3: Visible to every client on the platform
architects.benefit_3_body: Reach homeowners and businesses actively looking for architectural services in the Netherlands.
architects.benefit_3_feature_2: No ratings, reviews, or lead auctions
architects.step_1_body: Paste a link to a project on your website. We extract images and details and build your project page automatically.
architects.step_2_body: Review the generated page, adjust any details, then verify you own the domain. Your work stays connected to your practice.
architects.step_3_body: Our editorial team reviews every submission. Accepted projects go live on the platform and become visible to clients across the Netherlands.
architects.faq_1_q: Is Arco really free for architects?
architects.faq_1_a: Yes, completely. We charge service providers who want to connect with our architect network, which keeps the platform free for you. Architects never pay to publish or participate.
architects.faq_2_q: How selective is the application process?
architects.faq_2_a: We review every submission carefully, looking for thoughtful design, quality execution, and professional presentation. About 60% of applications are accepted.
architects.faq_3_q: Can I invite my preferred contractors and professionals?
architects.faq_3_a: Absolutely. You can invite trusted builders, interior designers, engineers, and other professionals. When you credit them on a project, that endorsement carries real weight.
architects.faq_4_q: How do clients find me on Arco?
architects.faq_4_a: Clients browse projects by style, location, and type. When they find work that resonates, they reach out directly through the platform — no bidding required.
architects.faq_5_q: What kind of projects should I submit?
architects.faq_5_a: Submit your best work — completed, professionally photographed, and based in the Netherlands. You can showcase international work once accepted.

professionals.hero_title: Be recognised through the work you've delivered.
professionals.hero_body: Arco is a curated architecture network where professionals are credited on real projects. When architects tag you, clients see your work and can reach out directly.
professionals.endorsement_subtitle: The professionals on Arco are here because an architect vouched for their work.
professionals.benefit_1_body: You're not another name in a directory. When an architect credits you on a project, it's a public endorsement of your craft.
professionals.benefit_1_feature_2: Endorsements from architects you've worked with
professionals.benefit_1_feature_3: Reputation built by association, not self-promotion
professionals.benefit_2_body: Clients on Arco are actively planning projects. When they find your work through an architect's project, the intent is real.
professionals.benefit_2_feature_1: Clients reach out directly — no bidding
professionals.benefit_2_feature_2: No ratings, reviews, or popularity metrics
professionals.benefit_3_title: A Platform That Works for You
professionals.benefit_3_body: Manage inquiries, showcase your project history, and connect with clients — all from a single professional profile.
professionals.benefit_3_feature_1: Professional profile with full project history
professionals.benefit_3_feature_3: Analytics on profile views and inquiries
professionals.step_1_body: Know a project you worked on that deserves to be seen? Send the architect a hint — we'll invite them to publish it on Arco and credit you.
professionals.step_2_body: When the architect publishes the project, they tag every professional who contributed. That credit becomes part of your profile.
professionals.step_3_body: Clients browsing projects discover your work through the architects who tagged you. When they're ready to build, they reach out directly.
professionals.faq_1_q: What kind of professionals is Arco for?
professionals.faq_1_a: Builders, contractors, interior designers, structural engineers, landscape architects, kitchen specialists — anyone involved in bringing architectural projects to life.
professionals.faq_2_q: How much does Arco cost for professionals?
professionals.faq_2_a: Arco is a paid platform for professionals. Pricing details are shared once an architect has credited you on a project and you're invited to activate your profile. There are no hidden fees or long-term commitments.
professionals.faq_3_a: Not yet. Professionals join Arco when an architect credits them on a published project. You can speed this up by suggesting a project to an architect you've worked with — we'll send them an invitation on your behalf.
professionals.faq_4_q: How is this different from Houzz or a directory?
professionals.faq_4_a: On Arco, your reputation is built through architect endorsements and real project credits — not reviews from anonymous users or paid placements. There are no ratings, no bidding wars, and no pay-to-play promotions.
professionals.faq_5_a: Clients browse architecture projects on Arco. When they see a project they love, they can see every professional who contributed — and reach out directly. Your visibility grows with every project you're credited on.
professionals.endorsement_1_quote: We've worked with Van der Berg Bouw on four projects now. Their attention to detail is exceptional.
professionals.endorsement_2_quote: The kind of contractor you can trust with a concept and know it'll be executed properly.
professionals.endorsement_3_quote: I recommend them to every client who asks. That's the highest compliment I can give.
